annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under AS 09.30.070 — 6.75% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Alaska’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-01-02; verify at public.courts.alaska.gov. Not legal advice.
